jd_text: We are supporting a high-growth FinTech startup building next-generation financial infrastructure in the region. This is a unique opportunity to join as a Product Lead with a clear path to Head of Product , working directly with the founders to build and scale the product from 0 → 1 . The role is ideal for someone who thrives in ambiguity, enjoys building from scratch, and wants to take full ownership of product strategy and execution . What You’ll Do Own and drive the end-to-end product lifecycle from ideation to launch and scale Work closely with founders to define product vision, roadmap, and go-to-market strategy Build and scale lending / credit-focused products within a FinTech ecosystem Collaborate with Engineering, Design, and Data teams to deliver high-quality, scalable solutions Design and optimize user journeys, onboarding flows, and credit decisioning experiences Integrate with local ecosystem partners (KYC providers, open banking platforms, payment systems) Leverage data, experimentation, and customer insights to drive product decisions Operate in a 0 → 1 environment , balancing speed with product quality What We’re Looking For 6–10 years of experience in Product Management , with strong exposure to FinTech Hands-on experience in lending, credit, or financial products Strong understanding of UAE / GCC market nuances , including open banking, KYC, and local integrations Proven ability to build and scale products in a startup or high-growth environment Strong technical understanding and ability to work closely with engineering teams High ownership mindset with the ability to operate in fast-paced, ambiguous environments Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills Why This Role? Clear path to Head of Product Opportunity to build a product from 0 → 1 in a high-growth FinTech startup Work directly with founders and influence key business decisions High equity upside with compensation revisited post funding Fast-paced, high-impact, ownership-driven environment
